L

level - Variable in class model.Player.Builder
 
level - Variable in class model.Player
The level of the player.
level(int) - Method in class model.Player.Builder
Sets the level of the player.
loadGame(String[]) - Method in class controller.LoadGameController
Loads a saved game using the data from the specified line in the saves file, constructs player objects, updates the game panel, and switches to the gamePanel view.
LoadGameController - Class in controller
Controller responsible for managing the loading and deletion of saved game data.
LoadGameController() - Constructor for class controller.LoadGameController
Private constructor to initialize listeners for UI components and set up actions for loading and deleting game saves.
loadGamePanel - Variable in class controller.LoadGameController
The singleton instance of LoadGamePanel for UI interactions related to loading games.
loadGamePanel - Variable in class controller.MenuPanelController
Instance of LoadGamePanel used in this controller
loadSaves() - Method in class controller.MenuPanelController
Retrieves and displays saved game information on the load game panel.
lost - Variable in class model.Player.Builder
 
lost - Variable in class model.Player
The number of games lost by the player.
lost(int) - Method in class model.Player.Builder
Sets the number of games lost by the player.
